workflow02-run-ideation-stage.md.title: Run Ideation Stage
workflow02-run-ideation-stage.md.description: The Ideation stage is the first stage in every workflow. It involves composing your initial idea, optionally adding UIUX references, and refining the idea with AI assistance.
workflow02-run-ideation-stage.md.author: AI Librarian

workflow03-run-requirement-stage.md.title: Run Requirement Stage
workflow03-run-requirement-stage.md.description: The Requirement stage transforms your refined idea into structured requirements and breaks them into implementable features.
workflow03-run-requirement-stage.md.author: AI Librarian

workflow04-feature-implementation.md.title: Feature Implementation Lifecycle
workflow04-feature-implementation.md.description: After Feature Breakdown, each feature has its own lane with 8 steps that progress through the implementation lifecycle.
workflow04-feature-implementation.md.author: AI Librarian

workflow05-change-interaction-mode.md.title: Change Interaction Mode
workflow05-change-interaction-mode.md.description: Each workflow can be set to one of three interaction modes that control how the AI agent interacts with you during task execution.
workflow05-change-interaction-mode.md.author: AI Librarian

workflow06-manage-dependencies.md.title: Manage Feature Dependencies
workflow06-manage-dependencies.md.description: Features created during Feature Breakdown can have dependencies on each other. Dependencies control the execution order of feature lane steps.
workflow06-manage-dependencies.md.author: AI Librarian

workflow07-browse-deliverables.md.title: Browse Deliverables
workflow07-browse-deliverables.md.description: Every workflow action produces deliverables — files and folders that are tracked and viewable from the workflow card.
workflow07-browse-deliverables.md.author: AI Librarian

workflow08-delete-workflow.md.title: Delete Workflow
workflow08-delete-workflow.md.description: You can permanently delete a workflow and its state file through the Actions menu.
workflow08-delete-workflow.md.author: AI Librarian
